nodes.name: loss.py
nodes.summary: Computes the configured training loss for GraphGym tasks, including cross entropy, binary cross entropy, MSE, and registered custom losses.

nodes.name: compute_loss
nodes.summary: Selects and computes the configured objective for classification, binary classification, regression, or custom registered losses.

nodes.name: model_builder.py
nodes.summary: Builds the configured PyTorch Geometric GraphGym model from registered model factories and optionally moves it to the active device.

nodes.name: create_model
nodes.summary: Instantiates the configured model class from the GraphGym registry and handles optional device placement.

nodes.name: model_builder_deepsnap.py
nodes.summary: Builds the DeepSNAP variant of configured GraphGym models and optionally transfers the model to the active device.

nodes.name: create_model
nodes.summary: Instantiates the configured model class from the GraphGym registry and handles optional device placement.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Marks the GraphGym models directory as a Python package for model-layer modules.

nodes.name: act.py
nodes.summary: Defines the activation registry mapping configuration names to PyTorch activation modules.

nodes.name: feature_augment.py
nodes.summary: Implements configurable graph feature augmentation for node, edge, and graph attributes, including structural metrics, binning, positional encodings, and preprocessing.

nodes.name: FeatureAugment
nodes.summary: Configurable augmentation module that computes structural graph features, converts representations, and augments labels or features across datasets.

nodes.name: Preprocess
nodes.summary: Preprocessing module that concatenates configured augmented node features into the batch node feature tensor.

nodes.summary: Defines node and edge feature encoders that wrap dataset-specific integer features with embeddings and optional batch normalization.

nodes.name: gnn.py
nodes.summary: Assembles the main GraphGym GNN architecture from feature encoders, optional pre-message-passing layers, configurable GNN stages, and task heads.

nodes.summary: Implements GNNLayer behavior used by gnn.py in the GraphGym training and model stack.

nodes.name: GNNPreMP
nodes.summary: Implements GNNPreMP behavior used by gnn.py in the GraphGym training and model stack.

nodes.name: GNNStackStage
nodes.summary: Stacks configurable GNN layers and applies skip-sum, skip-concat, and optional L2 normalization behavior.

nodes.name: FeatureEncoder
nodes.summary: Applies configured node and edge encoders plus optional normalization before message passing.

nodes.name: GNN
nodes.summary: Composes the full GraphGym model from encoder, optional pre-message-passing layers, GNN stage, task head, and weight initialization.

nodes.name: layer.py
nodes.summary: Provides reusable PyTorch Geometric layer wrappers, normalization wrappers, MLPs, and convolution registry entries for GraphGym models.

nodes.name: GeneralLayer
nodes.summary: Wraps a registered layer with optional batch normalization, layer normalization, dropout, activation, and L2 normalization.

nodes.name: GeneralMultiLayer
nodes.summary: Builds a sequential stack of GeneralLayer modules with configurable hidden and output dimensions.

nodes.name: Linear
nodes.summary: Adapts a linear layer to operate on tensors or batch node features.

nodes.name: BatchNorm1dNode
nodes.summary: Applies one-dimensional batch normalization to node feature tensors.

nodes.name: BatchNorm1dEdge
nodes.summary: Applies one-dimensional batch normalization to edge feature tensors.

nodes.name: MLP
nodes.summary: Builds a configurable multilayer perceptron from GraphGym linear wrappers.

nodes.name: GCNConv
nodes.summary: Wraps PyTorch Geometric GCNConv for GraphGym batch objects.

nodes.name: SAGEConv
nodes.summary: Wraps PyTorch Geometric SAGEConv for GraphGym batch objects.

nodes.name: GATConv
nodes.summary: Wraps PyTorch Geometric GATConv for GraphGym batch objects.

nodes.name: GINConv
nodes.summary: Wraps PyTorch Geometric GINConv with an internal two-layer neural network.

nodes.name: SplineConv
nodes.summary: Wraps PyTorch Geometric SplineConv using edge attributes.

nodes.name: GeneralConv
nodes.summary: Wraps the project general convolution layer for node updates.

nodes.name: GeneralEdgeConv
nodes.summary: Wraps the project edge-aware convolution layer using edge features.

nodes.name: GeneralSampleEdgeConv
nodes.summary: Samples edges according to configuration before applying edge-aware convolution.
